parameters.query:
INSERT INTO worker_locks(lock_key, owner_id, heartbeat_at)
VALUES ('cold_email_worker', $1, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (lock_key) DO UPDATE
SET owner_id = EXCLUDED.owner_id,
    heartbeat_at = NOW()
WHERE worker_locks.heartbeat_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
RETURNING lock_key, owner_id, heartbeat_at;

-- Reap stale processing jobs (visibility timeout 10 min)
UPDATE email_queue
SET status = 'queued',
    locked_by = NULL,
    locked_at = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE status = 'processing'
  AND locked_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
RETURNING id;

SELECT next_allowed_at,
       GREATEST(0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_allowed_at - NOW()))) AS wait_seconds
FROM rate_limits
WHERE key = 'sendgrid_global';

WITH picked AS (
  SELECT eq.id
  FROM email_queue eq
  JOIN leads l ON l.id = eq.lead_id
  WHERE eq.status = 'queued'
    AND eq.next_attempt_at <= NOW()
    AND l.email_valid = true
    AND l.unsubscribed_at IS NULL
    AND l.suppressed_reason IS NULL
  ORDER BY eq.priority ASC, eq.created_at ASC
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE OF eq SKIP LOCKED
)
UPDATE email_queue q
SET status = 'processing',
    locked_by = $1,
    locked_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
FROM picked
WHERE q.id = picked.id
RETURNING q.id AS queue_id, q.lead_id, q.campaign_type,
          q.attempt_count, q.max_attempts;
DELETE FROM worker_locks WHERE lock_key = 'cold_email_worker' AND owner_id = $1;

SELECT l.id, l.email, l.full_name, l.first_name, l.last_name,
       l.category, l.language, l.country, l.campus,
       l.tipo_producto, l.titling, l.facultad, l.phone
FROM leads l
WHERE l.id = $1;

INSERT INTO email_messages (lead_id, subject, body_html, body_text, campaign_type, status, idempotency_key)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'cold_email', 'sending', $5)
ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET status = 'sending', updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;

-- Mark message sent
UPDATE email_messages
SET status = 'sent', sent_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1;

-- Mark queue job sent
UPDATE email_queue
SET status = 'sent', locked_by = NULL, locked_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $2;

-- Mark lead sent
UPDATE leads
SET email_status = 'sent', last_email_sent_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $3;

-- Bump rate limit
UPDATE rate_limits
SET next_allowed_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '90 seconds', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE key = 'sendgrid_global';

-- Heartbeat lock
UPDATE worker_locks
SET heartbeat_at = NOW()
WHERE lock_key = 'cold_email_worker' AND owner_id = $4;

-- Audit event
INSERT INTO email_events(email_message_id, lead_id, queue_job_id, event_type, detail)
VALUES ($1, $3, $2, 'sent', '{}'::jsonb);

-- Backoff + DLQ logic
UPDATE email_queue
SET status = CASE
      WHEN attempt_count + 1 >= max_attempts THEN 'dead'
      ELSE 'queued'
    END,
    attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
    next_attempt_at = CASE
      WHEN attempt_count = 0 THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes'
      WHEN attempt_count = 1 THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
      WHEN attempt_count = 2 THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '2 hours'
      WHEN attempt_count = 3 THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '12 hours'
      ELSE NOW() + INTERVAL '24 hours'
    END,
    last_error = $2,
    locked_by = NULL,
    locked_at = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING status;

-- Mark message failed
UPDATE email_messages
SET status = 'failed', error_message = $2, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $3;

-- Reset lead to queued (unless dead)
UPDATE leads
SET email_status = CASE
      WHEN (SELECT status FROM email_queue WHERE id = $1) = 'dead' THEN 'failed'
      ELSE 'queued'
    END,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $4;

-- Heartbeat lock
UPDATE worker_locks
SET heartbeat_at = NOW()
WHERE lock_key = 'cold_email_worker' AND owner_id = $5;

-- Audit event
INSERT INTO email_events(email_message_id, lead_id, queue_job_id, event_type, detail)
VALUES ($3, $4, $1, 'failed', jsonb_build_object('error', $2));
